# Smart Meeting Scheduler (Uplizd) - Automate calendar availability and meeting coordination

## Summary
The Smart Meeting Scheduler is an intelligent Uplizd AI workflow designed to streamline calendar management by automatically identifying optimal meeting times and coordinating availability across stakeholders. By integrating directly with Google Calendar via the Composio Toolset, this solution eliminates back-and-forth scheduling friction, ensuring that meeting logistics are handled with precision, reducing administrative overhead, and maintaining a single source of truth for your professional appointments.

---
